codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: non-default tokenlists use small × controls, default lists have no delete control, delete now routes through a dynamic-name confirmation modal, and confirm/cancel behavior correctly preserves or removes lists while rebuilding token index and rerendering.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill's Docker rebuild guidance is incomplete for this repo setup: static UI changes also require a rebuild/restart to be reflected in the running containers, not just Python/nginx changes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file says rebuild when Python/nginx/Dockerfile change (.factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md, step 7), but this feature changed only static/js/app.js and static/css/style.css and still needed `docker compose build && docker compose up -d` per handoff verification commands.

summary: Reviewed feature delete-ux-improvement for ui-polish via feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff. No blocking or non-blocking code defects found against required behavior; review passes with one shared-state skill guidance observation.
